meta.title: TiDB Cloud Startup Program - $100k Credits & Support
meta.description: Join the TiDB Cloud Startup Program to launch fast and scale without limits. Get $100,000 in cloud credits, expert support, and go-to-market benefits.

sections.headline: Launch Fast. Scale without Limits.
sections.subheadline: Get $100,000 in TiDB Cloud credits, dedicated technical support, and go-to-market resources to accelerate your growth.

items.label: Cloud Credits
items.description: Free credits to build and scale your application on TiDB Cloud.

items.label: Faster Launch
items.description: Serverless architecture eliminates infrastructure setup time.

items.label: Expert Support
items.description: Direct access to TiDB engineers and architects.

sections.title: Everything You Need to Scale
sections.subtitle: Our Startup Program provides more than just credits. We offer the tools and guidance to help you succeed.

items.title: Serverless Flexibility
items.description: Pay only for what you use with our serverless tier. Automatically scale compute and storage without downtime.

items.title: Global Consistency
items.description: Deploy globally with strong consistency. Serve users anywhere with low latency and high availability.

items.title: MySQL Compatible
items.description: Leverage your existing MySQL skills and tools. No code changes required to migrate to TiDB.

items.title: HTAP Capabilities
items.description: Run transactions and analytics on the same data in real-time. Eliminate data silos and ETL pipelines.

items.quote: The TiDB Cloud Startup Program gave us the runway we needed to scale globally. The $100k credits were a game-changer for our infrastructure budget.
items.author: CTO, Fintech Unicorn

items.quote: We migrated from a traditional database in days, not months. The serverless architecture allowed us to handle our viral growth without a single outage.
items.author: Lead Engineer, SaaS Platform

items.q: Who is eligible for the TiDB Cloud Startup Program?
items.a: We support early-stage startups, typically those that have raised seed or Series A funding, are less than 5 years old, and have fewer than 50 employees.

items.q: How do I use the $100,000 in credits?
items.a: Credits are applied directly to your TiDB Cloud account and can be used for Serverless or Dedicated clusters. They expire 12 months after approval.

items.q: Do I need to pay anything to apply?
items.a: No, the application process is completely free. If approved, you receive credits and support at no upfront cost.

items.q: What kind of support is included?
items.a: Startups get access to a dedicated Slack channel with TiDB engineers, priority ticket handling, and architectural reviews.

sections.title: Ready to Scale Your Startup?
sections.subtitle: Join hundreds of innovative companies building on TiDB Cloud. Apply today to secure your $100,000 in credits.
